stemHtml: Which definition of propeller parameters is correct?

options.a: Helix angle is the angle between the actual path of the propeller and the propeller axis.
options.b: Blade angle is the angle between the blade chord line and the propeller axis.
options.c: Angle of attack is the angle between the blade chord line and the propeller vertical plane.
options.d: Geometric pitch is the theoretical distance a propeller would advance in one revolution at zero blade angle of attack.
